span.p: Legend

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 🔒 Personal zone — auto-created per user, owner-only, default landing spot for new entries with no explicit sensitivity

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 🏷 Sensitivity — private · shared · operational · meeting · system/strategic

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 👥 Org roles — admin · editor · commenter · viewer · agent (forced staging)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 💬 Comments — anyone who can READ can comment (API-only; not exposed to agents)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 🛡 RLS — all gates enforced at the database row level; no app-code bypass

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
📄 Entry E
sensitivity, owner,
department, grants

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
👤 User U
org role, department

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GATE 1 — Zone
Is E in a personal zone?
If yes: only the zone owner passes.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GATE 2 — Sensitivity ceiling
viewer ≤ shared/op/meeting
commenter ≤ shared
editor ≤ shared/op/meeting
admin = all (incl. system/strategic)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GATE 3 — Department scope
Editors: E.department = U.department
OR U owns E OR explicit grant

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GATE 4 — Explicit grants
Per-entry / per-path grants to
user or group. Additive only —
cannot exceed role ceiling.

div.style: color: rgb(22, 101, 52) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
✅ Resolved role on E:
viewer · commenter · editor · admin
or ❌ no access

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
❌ Invisible
(even to admins via normal API)

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: ❌ Above role ceiling

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
❌ Wrong department,
no ownership, no grant

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Who is writing?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🧑 Interactive user
(admin / editor via web UI)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🤖 Agent
(Claude session)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Direct write
Tier 1/2 auto-approve

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
submit_staging
(all agent writes)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Tier 1
Low-risk create / append / link
✅ auto

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Tier 2
Update on non-sensitive
✅ auto (after conflict check)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tier 3
High sensitivity (system/strategic)
🧠 AI review (Sonnet 4.6)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Tier 4
Delete / sensitivity change /
governance rule mod
🧑‍⚖️ human admin only

div.style: color: rgb(22, 101, 52) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 📥 Entry committed → READ SIDE

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 🚫 Rejected

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
promote_entry
add principals · bump sensitivity
additive · never downgrades
